context: Tests whether the agent correctly integrates Cloudflare Turnstile as an invisible-first CAPTCHA and implements a properly hidden honeypot field, including correct server-side verification and response codes.

checklist.name: Turnstile over alternatives
checklist.description: Uses Cloudflare Turnstile (cf-turnstile widget or challenges.cloudflare.com) rather than reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, or other CAPTCHA services

checklist.name: Turnstile script source
checklist.description: Loads Turnstile via script tag from https://challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v0/api.js

checklist.name: cf-turnstile div
checklist.description: Embeds the widget using a div with class cf-turnstile and a data-sitekey attribute

checklist.name: Server-side verification endpoint
checklist.description: POSTs the token to https://challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v0/siteverify with secret, response, and remoteip fields

checklist.name: 403 on verification failure
checklist.description: Returns HTTP 403 (not 400 or 401) when the Turnstile token is missing or verification fails

checklist.name: Passive/invisible-first mode
checklist.description: Code or comments indicate the CAPTCHA operates in invisible/passive mode and only escalates to a visible challenge when passive scoring detects suspicious activity

checklist.name: Honeypot CSS hiding
checklist.description: Honeypot container is hidden using CSS with position: absolute and left/top set to -9999px (not display:none or visibility:hidden)

checklist.name: Honeypot input attributes
checklist.description: Honeypot input has tabIndex={-1} (or tabindex="-1") AND autoComplete="off" (or autocomplete="off")

checklist.name: Silent discard on honeypot fill
checklist.description: When the honeypot field is filled, the form submission is silently discarded (optionally showing a fake success) rather than displaying an error that tips off the bot

checklist.name: Randomized honeypot name
checklist.description: Honeypot field name is not a static obvious value like 'website' or 'email2'; uses a randomized or session-specific name

checklist.name: No visible CAPTCHA by default
checklist.description: Does NOT configure the CAPTCHA to show a visible challenge widget for every user by default

checklist.name: x-www-form-urlencoded verification
checklist.description: Sends the siteverify request with Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
